title: StateChange Chat triggers full Chat/query+get, no delta sync
description: client_task.rs:539-547: when a StateChange SSE event includes 'Chat' in the changed types, handle_state_change calls load_chats() which issues Chat/query (limit 200) + Chat/get. The new state string from the SSE event is not used; there is no call to Chat/changes. This means every typing indicator, message send, or any server-side chat activity causes two round-trips re-fetching the full chat list. At 200 chats the Chat/get payload becomes large. Fix: use the state token from the SSE event to call Chat/changes, then Chat/get only the added/changed IDs; fall back to full load only on cannotCalculateChanges. Same pattern applies to the Message type path.
